titles.en: Chapter 93 – The Borad-beans and the Kidney-beans

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (22/179)
text: أَكْلُ الْبَاقِلَّى يُمَخِّخُ السَّاقَيْنِ وَ يَزِيدُ فِي الدِّمَاغِ وَ يُوَلِّدُ الدَّمَ الطَّرِيَّ .

en.hubeali: Muhammad Bin Yahya, from Muhammad Bin Ahmad, from Musa Bin Ja’far, from Muhammad Bin Al Hassan, from Umar Bin Salma, from Muhammad Bin Abdullah,
(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘Eating the Broad-beans enhances the two thighs, and increases in the brain, and gives birth to fresh blood’.
en.sarwar: 1. Muhammad ibn Yahya has narrated from Muhammad ibn Ahmad from Musa ibn Ja‘far from Muhammad ibn al-Hassan from ‘Umar ibn Salmah from Muhammad ibn ‘Abd Allah who has said the following: “Abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said, ‘Eating broad beans grows bone marrows of the legs, adds in the brain and produces fresh blood.”’

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: صحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (22/179)

parts.text: أَحْمَدَ بْنِ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ أَبِي نَصْرٍ

text: أَكْلُ الْبَاقِلَّى يُمَخِّخُ السَّاقَيْنِ وَ يُوَلِّدُ الدَّمَ الطَّرِيَّ .

en.hubeali: From him, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad Bin Isa, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad Bin Abu Nasr,
(It has been narrated) from Al-Reza<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘Eating the broad-beans enhances the two thighs, and gives birth to the fresh blood’.
en.sarwar: 2. It is narrated from the narrator of the previous Hadith from Ahmad ibn Muhammad ibn ‘Isa from Ahmad ibn Muhammad from ibn abu Nasr who has said the following: “Abu al-Hassan, al-Rida’, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said, ‘Eating broad beans grows the bone marrow of the legs and produces fresh blood.’”

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (2/179)
text: سَمِعْتُ أَبَا عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) يَقُولُ كُلُوا الْبَاقِلَّى بِقِشْرِهِ فَإِنَّهُ يَدْبُغُ الْمَعِدَةَ .

en.hubeali: A number of our companions, from Ahmad Bin Abu Abdullah, from one of his companions, from Salih Bin Uqba who said,
‘I heard Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> saying: ‘Eat the Broad-beans with its skin for it repairs the stomach’.
en.sarwar: 3. A number of our people have narrated from Ahmad ibn abu ‘Abd Allah from certain persons of his people from Salih ibn ‘Uqbah who has said the following: “I once, heard abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, saying, ‘Eat broad beans with its peels. It cleanses (tans) the stomach.’”

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف على المشهور - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (22/179)

en.hubeali: Ali Bin Muhammad, from Sahl Bin Ziyad, from Ibn Abu Najran, from the one who mentioned it,
(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘The Kidney-beans expel the underlying wind’.
en.sarwar: 4. Ali ibn Muhammad from Sahl ibn Ziyad from ibn abu Najran from those whom he has mentioned who has said the following: “Abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said, ‘Kidney beans dispel gases from the belly.’”
